mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completedCount, IFNULL(SUM(actual_duration), 0) AS totalDuration, IFNULL(AVG(accuracy), 0) AS avgAccuracy, IFNULL(SUM(star_reward), 0) AS totalStars FROM training_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND start_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
